UAE Payroll Services

Payroll & WPS Compliance

Full payroll management with Wage Protection System (WPS) compliance across all Emirates. Our payroll experts ensure full compliance with UAE labor laws and WPS requirements.

Get a QuoteBook Consultation

Wage Protection System (WPS)

The Wage Protection System (WPS) is an electronic salary transfer system that allows employers to pay wages through approved banks and financial institutions. WPS is mandatory for all UAE businesses and ensures timely payment of employee salaries.

Our payroll service includes full WPS compliance, ensuring all salary payments are processed through the WPS system with proper documentation and reporting to the Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation (MOHRE).

WPS Compliance Requirements

  • All employees must be registered in WPS
  • Salaries paid through approved banks
  • Salary file submission before payment date
  • Proof of payment within 15 days
  • Compliance with UAE labor law wage protection
  • Reporting to MOHRE for all transactions

Our Payroll Services

Payroll Processing

Complete payroll processing including salary calculations, overtime, allowances, and deductions for all Emirates.

WPS Filing

Preparation and submission of WPS salary files through approved banks with proper documentation.

End of Service Benefits

Calculation of gratuity and end of service benefits in compliance with UAE labor law.

GOSI & Social Security

Management of GOSI contributions for UAE nationals and social insurance compliance.

Employee Onboarding

Complete onboarding including labor card processing, visa sponsorship, and WPS registration.

Leave Management

Tracking and calculation of annual leave, sick leave, and other leave types per UAE labor law.

Gratuity Calculation (End of Service Benefits)

Under UAE labor law, employees are entitled to gratuity (end of service benefits) upon termination of employment. The calculation depends on the type of contract and length of service.

Limited Contract

  • • Less than 1 year: No gratuity
  • • 1-5 years: 21 days per year
  • • More than 5 years: 30 days per year

Unlimited Contract

  • • Less than 1 year: No gratuity
  • • 1-5 years: 21 days per year
  • • More than 5 years: 30 days per year

*Calculation based on basic salary. Specific rules apply for different termination scenarios.

Start-up

AED 1,299/mo

For businesses with up to 10 employees

  • Monthly payroll processing
  • WPS filing
  • Payslip generation

*All prices exclude 5% UAE VAT

Frequently Asked Questions

Is WPS mandatory for all businesses?

Yes. WPS is mandatory for all UAE businesses with employees. Non-compliance can result in fines, work permit suspensions, and other penalties. We ensure full WPS compliance.

What information do I need for payroll?

We need employee details (name, passport, visa, labor card), salary information, working hours, allowances, and deductions. We provide a secure portal for data submission.

Do you handle GOSI for UAE nationals?

Yes. We manage GOSI (General Organization for Social Insurance) contributions for UAE national employees, ensuring proper registration and monthly contributions.

Can you handle payroll for multiple Emirates?

Yes. We have experience with payroll across all seven Emirates including Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and others. We understand the specific requirements of each Emirate.

Compliant Payroll Across All Emirates

Let us handle your payroll and WPS compliance while you focus on growing your business.
